login.title: Sign in to your account
login.subtitle: New here? Signing in creates your account automatically.
login.googleFailed: Google sign-in failed. Please try email instead.
login.emailNote: No password needed. We'll email you a one-click sign-in link.
login.linkSentTo: We sent a sign-in link to {email}. Click it to continue. The link expires in 1 hour.
login.authFailed: Sign-in failed. Please try again or use email instead.
login.githubFailed: GitHub sign-in failed. Please try email instead.
login.heroDescription: 50 Israeli tech companies pre-loaded. AI-generated profiles, competitive analysis, and tech stack breakdowns. Ask anything, get cited answers.
login.feature1Desc: Every answer is grounded in company data, not the internet
login.feature2Desc: Reports, quizzes, mind maps, and slide decks per company
login.feature3Desc: Company profiles generated on-demand via AI
login.poweredBy: Powered by Gemini, RAG Pipelines, and pgvector
login.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
login.signUpSuccess: Check your email to confirm your account.
login.passwordRequirements: Min 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, number, and symbol

dashboard.emptyState: Select a company to get started, or create a custom research notebook
dashboard.readyCount: {count} {count, plural, one {company} other {companies}} ready to research
dashboard.emptyDescription: Select a company from the featured section to start researching
dashboard.cloneFailed: Failed to load company profile. Try again.

featured.wixDesc: Leading cloud-based website builder and web development platform serving 250M+ users worldwide
featured.mondayComDesc: Work operating system powering teams to run projects and workflows with confidence
featured.jfrogDesc: Universal software supply chain platform for DevOps, Security, and MLOps
featured.fiverrDesc: Global online marketplace connecting businesses with freelance talent offering digital services
featured.gongDesc: Revenue intelligence platform using AI to capture and analyze customer interactions
featured.appsflyerDesc: Mobile attribution and marketing analytics platform trusted by 12,000+ brands
featured.snykDesc: Developer-first security platform helping teams find and fix vulnerabilities in code and dependencies
featured.checkPointDesc: Leading cybersecurity company providing AI-powered cloud-delivered cyber security solutions
featured.cyberArkDesc: Global leader in identity security, providing privileged access management solutions
featured.tabnineDesc: AI code assistant that helps developers write code faster with intelligent completions and chat
featured.walkMeDesc: Digital adoption platform providing guidance, engagement, and automation for enterprise software
featured.cloudinaryDesc: Cloud-based media management platform for image and video optimization, transformation, and delivery
featured.redisDesc: Real-time data platform providing in-memory database, caching, and message broker solutions
featured.lightrunDesc: Developer observability platform enabling real-time debugging and logging in production without redeployment
featured.qodoDesc: AI-powered code quality platform helping developers write better code with intelligent testing and review
featured.promptSecurityDesc: Security platform protecting enterprise AI applications against prompt injection, data leakage, and misuse
featured.armisDesc: Asset intelligence cybersecurity platform providing visibility and security for managed and unmanaged devices
featured.catoNetworksDesc: Converged cloud-native SASE platform providing networking and security as a single global cloud service
featured.penteraDesc: Automated security validation platform that continuously tests and validates cybersecurity defenses
featured.silverfortDesc: Unified identity protection platform extending MFA and zero trust to all resources without agents
featured.payoneerDesc: Global payment platform enabling businesses to send and receive cross-border payments in 190+ countries
featured.melioDesc: B2B payments platform simplifying accounts payable and receivable for small businesses
featured.tipaltiDesc: Global payables automation platform streamlining supplier payments, tax compliance, and AP workflows
featured.pagayaDesc: AI-driven financial technology company using machine learning to manage institutional money in credit markets
featured.lemonadeDesc: AI-powered insurance company offering renters, homeowners, car, pet, and life insurance
featured.yotpoDesc: E-commerce marketing platform providing reviews, loyalty, SMS marketing, and subscription solutions
featured.riskifiedDesc: AI-powered fraud management platform helping e-commerce merchants maximize revenue and manage risk
featured.forterDesc: Digital commerce trust platform providing real-time fraud prevention across the entire customer journey
featured.dynamicYieldDesc: AI-powered personalization platform delivering individualized experiences across web, apps, and email
featured.coralogixDesc: Full-stack observability platform with logs, metrics, and tracing with built-in machine learning insights
featured.bigPandaDesc: AIOps platform automating IT incident management with event correlation and root cause analysis
featured.viaDesc: Transportation technology company providing on-demand transit solutions for cities and companies
featured.innovizDesc: LiDAR sensor and perception software provider enabling autonomous driving solutions for major OEMs
featured.optibusDesc: AI-powered mass transportation management platform optimizing planning and scheduling for transit agencies
featured.winnAiDesc: AI-powered sales assistant that automatically captures and updates CRM data during live sales calls
featured.nimbleDesc: AI-powered web data collection platform enabling businesses to access public web data at scale
featured.animaDesc: Design-to-code platform converting Figma designs into production-ready React, Vue, and HTML code
featured.secondNatureDesc: AI-powered sales training platform using virtual role-play to improve sales team performance
featured.singularDesc: Marketing analytics platform providing unified attribution, analytics, and creative optimization
featured.bringgDesc: Delivery and fulfillment cloud platform powering last-mile logistics for enterprise retailers
featured.vizAiDesc: AI-powered clinical intelligence platform detecting diseases from medical imaging to accelerate care
featured.tytoCareDesc: AI-powered remote medical examination platform enabling comprehensive physical exams from home
featured.orcaSecurityDesc: Agentless cloud security platform providing instant visibility and coverage for cloud estates
featured.rapydDesc: Global fintech-as-a-service platform enabling businesses to accept and make payments worldwide
featured.matiaDesc: AI-powered data infrastructure platform helping enterprises manage and govern their data lifecycle
featured.legatoDesc: AI-powered application creation platform enabling rapid development of enterprise applications
featured.brandlightDesc: AI brand visibility platform helping brands monitor and optimize their presence in AI chatbot responses
featured.take2Desc: AI-powered healthcare recruitment platform using simulations to assess and match candidates
featured.guiddeDesc: AI-powered video documentation platform creating step-by-step guides for software training
featured.similarWebDesc: Digital intelligence platform providing website analytics, traffic insights, and competitive analysis

chat.allAnswers: All answers are grounded in the company's profile data.
chat.placeholder: Ask about tech stack, culture, products...
chat.sendHint: Enter to send. Shift+Enter for new line. Sources cited below each reply.
chat.rateLimitError: Rate limit reached. You can send up to 10 messages per minute.
chat.genericError: Couldn't complete the request. Try again in a moment.
chat.unsupportedType: Unsupported file type. Upload PDF, DOCX, or TXT.
chat.fileTooLarge: File is too large. Maximum size is 5 MB.
chat.messageTooLong: Message is too long. Keep it under 2,000 characters.
chat.starter3: What engineering roles are they hiring for?
chat.starter5: What is their company culture like?
chat.starter6: What recent developments have they had?
chat.uploadToStart: Select a company to start researching
chat.uploadToStartDesc: Choose from the company profiles or upload custom data.

sources.title: Sources
sources.dropOrClick: Drop file or click to add data
sources.addPdfToStart: Add company data to start researching
sources.unsupportedType: Unsupported file type. Upload PDF, DOCX, or TXT.
sources.duplicateFile: This file has already been loaded
sources.fileLimitReached: Maximum 5 files per research notebook. Delete a file to add more.
sources.uploadInProgress: Upload in progress from another panel...

studio.title: Studio
studio.description: Generate company analysis and intelligence reports.
studio.flashcardsDesc: Key facts about the company at a glance
studio.quizDesc: Test your knowledge of this company
studio.generatingNote: This may take 10-30 seconds for detailed profiles.
studio.disclaimer: Generated content is AI-produced and may not be perfectly accurate. Always verify against official company sources.
studio.noNotes: No notes yet. Create one to start writing.
studio.deleteNoteConfirm: This will permanently delete this note. This action cannot be undone.
studio.oneAtATime: One generation at a time. Please wait for the current one to finish.
studio.question: Question

upload.pdfOnly: PDF, DOCX, or TXT. Max {size} MB. Text-based files only.
upload.processingRedirect: Processing company data. You'll be redirected automatically.
upload.largeDocNote: This may take up to 60 seconds for large profiles.
upload.timeoutError: Processing timed out. The research may still finish. Check your dashboard.
upload.processingFailed: Couldn't process this file. It may be scanned, corrupted, or too complex. Try another file.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

settings.title: Settings
settings.privacyInfo: Your data is stored securely in Supabase. We don't share your data with third parties.
settings.exportDataDesc: Download all your research, notes, and messages as JSON
settings.deleteAllNotebooksDesc: Remove all research notebooks and data
settings.deleteAllNotebooksConfirm: This will permanently delete all your research, data, and chat history. This cannot be undone.
settings.deleteAccountConfirm: Are you sure? This will permanently delete your account and all data.

share.title: Share company profile
share.readOnly: This is a shared company profile. Sign up for full access.
share.chatLimit: Chat limit reached. Try again later.

members.title: Members
members.userNotFound: User not found. They must sign up first.
